Class EnsureChildNodeCommand

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.AbstractCommand
io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.commands.EnsureChildNodeCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICommand
public class EnsureChildNodeCommand extends AbstractCommand
A command used to ensure that a child node exists. The command creates the child node and adds it if it does not already exist.
Author:
eric.wittmann@gmail.com
